data.description: Fed bids for 30-year bond total $8.5 bln.

data.title: PetVivo to hold conference call on Aug 14, 2025 at 5:00pm ET to discuss first fiscal quarter results ending June 30, 2025.
data.description: A conference call is scheduled to be held by PetVivo Holdings, Inc. on Thursday, August 14, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern time to review the financial performance for the fiscal first quarter concluding on June 30, 2025. PetVivo Holdings, Inc., a prominent biomedical firm specializing in pioneering medical solutions for equines and companion animals, will be sharing the results during the call. The company's stock is listed as OTCQX: PETV, with the OTCID being PETVW. The official financial report will be released to the public via a press release before the scheduled conference call.

data.title: Ethereum Treasury firm to raise $200M through SharpLink, selling shares at $19.50 each for more ETH buys.ETH holdings near $2B.
data.description: The ETH treasury company is offering its common stock shares at a price of $19.50 each to generate funds. The goal is to increase its existing Ethereum reserves, which currently amount to close to $2 billion.

data.title: Canadian fast-casual chain, WingsUp!, with 37 locations in Canada, expands to the U.S., eyeing growth.
data.description: In a recent announcement on August 7, 2025, WingsUp! - the popular Canadian fast-casual eatery recognized for its customizable chicken wings and diverse flavor options - has expanded its reach beyond Canada. The chain, originating from Burlington, has successfully established 37 outlets nationwide, with a recent addition in Calgary marking their growth.

data.title: Inventor from Oklahoma creates new Tracc Shoes for safety & protection, lets family know location; MHO-554.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on August 7, 2025, an inventor from Oklahoma City, Okla., revealed a new innovation aimed at enhancing safety and security in footwear. This invention, known as TRACC, incorporates features designed to provide increased protection and the ability to notify a trusted family member of the wearer's location during emergencies. The inventor's goal was to create a pair of shoes with added safety measures, highlighting the importance of personal security.

data.title: Pecan Plantation to hold final fly-in land event Aug 23-24. Only 30 taxiway lots left in nation's fastest-selling airpark community. Just 35 miles from Dallas-Fort Worth.
data.description: The Landings Airpark in Granbury, Texas, has sold more than 80% of its lots, with only 30 taxiway lots left in this sought-after aviation community located just 35 miles from Dallas-Fort Worth. Pecan Plantation will be hosting its Final Fly-In Land Sales Event on August 23-24 to release the remaining lots to interested buyers.

data.title: OTC Markets Group welcomes Neptune Digital Assets Corp. to OTCQX, trading on the Best Market from OTCQB.
data.description: On July 30, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc. disclosed that Neptune Digital Assets Corp. (TSX-V: NDA; OTCQX: NPPTF), involved in various activities within the digital asset sector, has met the requirements to be listed on the OTCQX® Best Market. This market, overseen by OTC Markets Group Inc., facilitates the trade of 12,000 U.S. and international securities. Prior to this upgrade, Neptune Digital Assets Corp. was trading on the OTCQB® Venture Market.

data.title: Trump criticizes BLS after firing chief, accusing published jobs data of being rigged to favor Biden. Nearly 900,000 job revision. GLD ETF rises.
data.description: President Donald Trump has recently fired Bureau of Labor Statistics Commissioner Erika McEntarfer and accused the agency of manipulating employment data to benefit Joe Biden during the 2024 election. Trump criticized the BLS for announcing record job numbers followed by a significant revision of nearly 900,000 jobs, labeling it as a politically-motivated move. He claimed that the BLS's actions were intended to boost Biden's economic image before the election, despite his poor performance. Trump's remarks on CNBC's Squawk highlighted his belief that the job revision was biased and aimed at influencing the election results. This has reignited discussions about the credibility and impartiality of the agency. On a different note, the GLD ETF has shown signs of recovery recently. For more details, see the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: US labor market faces slowdown with only 73,000 jobs added in July, below expectations of 110,000. May, June figures also revised downwards significantly, reflecting the worst job growth since Dec. 2020. The bright spot: wages remain stable. Trump threatens Fed takeover.
data.description: The U.S. labor market delivered disappointing news with the July jobs report. Nonfarm payrolls only rose by 73,000, way below the expected 110,000, showing a sharp hiring slowdown. Private sector added 83,000 jobs while government employment shrank by 10,000. Moreover, previous months were revised downward drastically - May's job growth from 144,000 to 19,000 and June from 147,000 to just 14,000. This made May and June the worst months for employment growth since December 2020, wiping out a combined 258,000 jobs. Wages remained steady, providing a silver lining amidst the disappointing data. President Trump's tariff policies seem to be contributing to economic uncertainty.

data.title: Trump fired BLS Commissioner McEntarfer, a Biden appointee confirmed with bipartisan support, causing challenges for BLS.
data.description: On Friday, President Donald Trump terminated BLS Commissioner Erika McEntarfer, appointed by Biden and confirmed with strong bipartisan approval. This has caused significant damage to BLS's credibility and poses major obstacles for the individual tasked with restoring the quality of its output.

data.title: Deciens Capital raises $93.33M for Fund III, reaching total assets of $290M for next-gen financial services.
data.description: Deciens Capital, a venture capital firm specializing in financial services innovation, has recently completed the fundraising for Fund III, securing $93.33 million in commitments from limited partners. This success has elevated their total assets under management to $290 million. The fund's closure signifies the ongoing backing for Deciens' focused and high-confidence investment approach. Notably, both Fund I and Fund II have performed exceptionally well, ranking in the top quartile for Total Value to Paid-In (TVPI). In addition, Fund I has achieved a top-decile status based on Carta benchmarks for its vintage.

data.title: ElephantSqlDB® introduces Quantum‑Powered Cloud Database for enterprise-level performance at affordable prices, providing single-digit-millisecond search speeds with data volumes up to petabytes.
data.description: ElephantSqlDB, Inc. and its subsidiary Dataark Systems, LLC unveiled ElephantSqlDB®, the first SaaS database employing a quantum-asymptotic architecture. This innovative platform integrates Grover’s algorithm with NVIDIA® GPU simulation tech for unparalleled search speeds lasting single-digit milliseconds. Even as data scales from terabytes to petabytes, the system maintains its efficiency.

data.title: Trump wants Fed to cut borrowing costs to lower mortgage rates for homebuyers, but Fed Chairman Powell can't meet his demand.
data.description: President Trump is urging the Federal Reserve to reduce borrowing rates, stating that it would aid in lowering mortgage rates for potential homebuyers.

data.title: Grand Rapids event celebrates art and music with headliner Tiera Kennedy. ArtPrize Halftime draws large crowd to Sixth Street Park for a free outdoor concert.
data.description: Grand Rapids, Michigan - On August 7, 2025, ArtPrize Halftime, sponsored by Rockford, will host a mid-festival event uniting music enthusiasts, artists, and the Grand Rapids community. The free concert at Sixth Street Park promises a memorable night for attendees.
